product_overview: PC Builder is a web application to plan, assemble and save PC builds, compare benchmark scores, and engage with a community forum. It includes an admin area for inventory, presets and system configuration to drive recommendations and scoring.
core_goals: Allow users to plan and assemble PC builds from a curated hardware inventory with real-time pricing and benchmark scoring.
Provide a guided Build Wizard that recommends presets by usage and budget to simplify decision-making.
Host a community forum where authenticated users can post, comment, like and report content.
Expose admin tools to manage hardware inventory, presets, users, and system-wide benchmark/configuration settings.
Deliver account management (register, login, password reset) and real-time notifications for user activity.

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new user account by providing name, username, email and password and receive success or validation feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Initiate account registration -> Fill name, username, email, password -> Submit registration -> See success toast and user created in database
Navigate to / -> Initiate account registration -> Fill email that already exists -> Submit registration -> See error message 'Email already exists'
Navigate to / -> Initiate account registration -> Fill username that already exists -> Submit registration -> See error message 'Username already taken'
Navigate to / -> Initiate account registration -> Leave required field blank -> Submit registration -> See validation error for the missing field

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate with email/password or Google OAuth and reflect authenticated state in the navbar and protected pages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Initiate Sign In -> Fill email and password -> Submit login form -> See Navbar update with user info and access protected pages
Navigate to / -> Initiate Sign In -> Fill incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See error 'Invalid credentials'
Navigate to / -> Initiate Sign In -> Choose Google OAuth -> Complete Google authentication -> See Navbar update with user info and account created if new
Navigate to / -> Initiate Sign In -> Request logout -> End session -> See Navbar return to guest state

features.name: Password Reset
features.description: Request a password reset email and set a new password using a token validated on the reset page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Request password reset with existing email -> Receive reset email and token created in database -> Navigate to /reset-password with token -> Fill new password -> Submit -> See success confirmation
Navigate to / -> Request password reset with unknown email -> Submit -> See generic success message (prevent enumeration)
Navigate to /reset-password?token=invalid -> Fill new password -> Submit -> See error 'Token expired' or invalid token message

features.name: Homepage & Component Guide
features.description: Introduce product, provide entry to Build Wizard and offer a component guide slider with details and smooth interactions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See Hero banner and 3D animation render -> Use component guide slider to browse components -> Open component details -> See title, description and specs
Navigate to / -> Use 'PLAN YOUR BUILD' affordance -> Navigate to /plan -> See Build Wizard start
Navigate to / -> Interact with slider on mobile -> Drag slider left or right -> See slider respond smoothly
Navigate to / -> Open component details -> Component images fail to load -> See image placeholders and details still displayed

features.name: PC Build System
features.description: Select components across categories to compose builds, view price and benchmark scores, and save builds to a user account.
user_flows: Navigate to /build -> Select a component category -> Select a component from the list -> See total price update automatically -> See Gaming, Working, Creative benchmark scores update
Navigate to /build -> Select components across CPU and GPU -> Enter build name -> Save build while authenticated -> See success toast and build persisted
Navigate to /build -> Select components -> Attempt to save without a build name -> Submit -> See validation error for missing build name
Navigate to /build -> Select components -> Attempt to save while not authenticated -> Submit -> See login prompt and save blocked

features.name: Build Wizard
features.description: Guide users step-by-step to choose usage and budget, present recommended preset builds and allow jumping to the Build page for customization.
user_flows: Navigate to /plan -> Select usage type (Gaming/Working/Creative) -> Select budget tier (Entry/Mid/Hi-End/Ultra) -> View recommended preset build loaded from API -> Click to customize -> Navigate to /build with preset applied
Navigate to /plan -> Select usage type -> Select budget tier that has no preset -> See message 'ยังไม่มีสเปกแนะนำ' and alternative actions
Navigate to /plan -> Start Step 1 -> Change selection and go back -> See wizard return to previous step and selections cleared or updated
Navigate to /plan -> Select usage then choose 'skip to manual build' -> Navigate to /build immediately

features.name: Forum Posts
features.description: Authenticated users can create posts with title, content, optional images and attached builds; posts appear in the forum feed.
user_flows: Navigate to /forum -> Initiate new post -> Fill title, content and select category -> Optionally upload images and attach a PC Build -> Submit post -> See new post appear in forum feed
Navigate to /forum -> Attempt to create a post while not authenticated -> Initiate new post -> Submit -> See login prompt and post not created
Navigate to /forum -> Create a post with images -> Images upload to Cloudinary -> See images attached and visible on the created post
Navigate to /forum -> Create post with missing title -> Submit -> See validation error asking for title

features.name: Forum Comments
features.description: Add comments and likes on posts; interactions update counts and appear immediately for authenticated users.
user_flows: Navigate to /forum -> Open a post detail view -> Type comment -> Submit comment -> See comment appear under the post
Navigate to /forum -> Open a post detail view -> Click like on a comment -> See comment like count increase
Navigate to /forum -> Open a post detail view while unauthenticated -> Attempt to submit a comment -> See login prompt and comment not submitted
Navigate to /forum -> Open a post detail view -> Attempt to submit empty comment -> Submit -> See validation error

features.name: Report System
features.description: Authenticated users can report posts or comments by selecting a reason and optionally adding a description; reports are stored for admin review.
user_flows: Navigate to /forum -> Open target post or comment -> Initiate report -> Select reason and optionally add description -> Submit report -> See confirmation and report stored
Navigate to /forum -> Attempt to report while unauthenticated -> Initiate report -> Submit -> See login prompt
Navigate to /forum -> Initiate report -> Submit without selecting a reason -> Submit -> See validation error requiring a reason

features.name: Notification System
features.description: Show real-time notification badges and allow users to open, navigate from and mark notifications as read.
user_flows: Navigate to / as an authenticated user -> See notification badge on navbar bell icon with unread count -> Open notification dropdown -> Click a notification -> Navigate to target URL and mark notification as read
Navigate to / as an authenticated user -> Open notification dropdown -> Mark individual notification as read -> See badge count decrease
Navigate to / as unauthenticated user -> Observe no notification badge or dropdown visible

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provide administrators with system statistics, activity charts and latest reports to monitor platform health.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin as ADMIN -> See total users, components, posts and builds counts -> See activity chart rendered and latest reports listed
Navigate to /admin as unauthenticated user -> Attempt access -> Be redirected to login or homepage depending on middleware
Navigate to /admin as non-ADMIN user -> Attempt access -> Be redirected to homepage

features.name: Admin Hardware Inventory
features.description: Admins can view, filter and perform CRUD operations on hardware components including type-specific fields and validations.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/inventory as ADMIN -> See list of all components with type, name, brand and price -> Filter by component type -> See filtered results
Navigate to /admin/inventory as ADMIN -> Add a new CPU -> Fill CPU-specific fields (socket, cpuSingle, cpuMulti) -> Submit -> See new component in list
Navigate to /admin/inventory as ADMIN -> Add component missing required fields -> Submit -> See validation error preventing save
Navigate to /admin/inventory as ADMIN -> Delete a component -> Confirm deletion -> See component removed from list

features.name: Admin Preset Management
features.description: Admins manage recommended preset builds: create, edit, toggle active/inactive and remove presets used by the Build Wizard.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/presets as ADMIN -> See list of presets including active/inactive -> Create a new preset by selecting usage and budget -> Select components from database -> See auto-filled names and prices and total price calculated -> Save preset -> See preset appear in list
Navigate to /admin/presets as ADMIN -> Create preset without selecting any components -> Submit -> See validation error requiring at least one component
Navigate to /admin/presets as ADMIN -> Toggle preset to inactive -> Save -> Confirm preset no longer appears in /plan presets

features.name: Admin System Configuration
features.description: Adjust benchmark baselines, weights and forum policies with validation and critical confirmations to control scoring and forum behavior.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings as ADMIN -> View current baseline and weight values -> Edit baseline values -> Save changes -> See critical confirmation modal -> Confirm -> See updated baselines applied
Navigate to /admin/settings as ADMIN -> Edit weights so they sum to 100% -> See green badge and enabled Save -> Save -> See confirmation modal
Navigate to /admin/settings as ADMIN -> Edit weights so they do not sum to 100% -> See red badge and Save disabled -> Correct weights to enable Save

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Admins can view users, change roles and status (active/suspended/banned) and delete accounts with safeguards.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/users as ADMIN -> See list of users with name, email, role and status -> Change a user's role from USER to ADMIN -> See role updated
Navigate to /admin/users as ADMIN -> Change a user's status to BANNED -> Save -> See user unable to authenticate thereafter
Navigate to /admin/users as ADMIN -> Attempt to delete an admin account with safeguards -> See warning or blocked action preventing accidental self-deletion

routes.description: Homepage with Hero banner, build steps, PC Component Guide slider
PC Build page where users select components and view benchmark scores
Build Wizard - step-by-step guide to choose usage and budget for recommended builds
Community forum with posts, comments, likes, and reporting
User profile page with saved builds and account settings
Password reset page with token validation
Admin dashboard with stats, graphs, reports summary
Admin preset build management for Build Wizard
System configuration for baselines, weights, forum policies

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Register new account with email, username, and password
user_interactions: Click Sign Up button in Navbar
Fill name, username, email, password fields
See success toast or error message

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email/password or Google OAuth
user_interactions: Click Sign In button in Navbar
See Navbar update with user info on success

features.name: PC Build System
features.description: Select PC components across 8 categories and view benchmark scores
user_interactions: Click on component category (CPU, GPU, RAM, etc.)
Select a component from the modal list
See Gaming, Working, Creative benchmark scores

features.name: Build Wizard
features.description: Guided step-by-step wizard to recommend PC specs based on usage and budget
user_interactions: Select budget tier (Entry, Mid, Hi-End, Ultra)
View recommended preset build with component details and reasons
Click to customize in Build page
Click back button to change selections

features.name: Forum Posts
features.description: Create, view, like posts in community forum
user_interactions: Click on post to view details

features.name: Forum Comments
features.description: Add comments to forum posts and like comments

features.name: Report System
features.description: Report inappropriate posts or comments
user_interactions: Click report button on post or comment

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Overview statistics and system health for administrators
user_interactions: View total users, components, posts, builds counts
Navigate via sidebar to other admin pages

features.name: Admin Hardware Inventory
features.description: CRUD operations for PC components in database
user_interactions: Click Add button to open form
Fill component details (name, brand, price, specs)
See dynamic fields based on selected type (CPU shows socket, GPU shows vram)

features.name: Admin Preset Management
features.description: Manage recommended PC build presets for Build Wizard
user_interactions: Select usage type and budget tier

features.name: Admin System Configuration
features.description: Configure benchmark baselines, weights, and forum policies
user_interactions: View weight values with real-time sum validation
See green badge when weights sum to 100%
See red badge and disabled save when weights dont sum to 100%

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Manage user roles, status, and accounts

features.name: Notification System
features.description: Real-time notifications for users
user_interactions: See notification badge on navbar bell icon
Click notification to navigate to target
